headline: Iran's Peace Plan 💌 Gets Trump THUMBS DOWN 👎🍊 via Pakistan Ping Pong 🏓🇵🇰
text:
Iran 🕌💥 dropping a THICC 14-POINT PEACE BOMB 💣📜 on Uncle Sam 🇺🇸🦅, hand-delivered thru PAKISTAN POSTMAN 🏍️📮 – Tasnim spilling the tea ☕: 'US responded, we're SIMPING over it rn 😩📖!' But TRUMP DADDY 🍊👑 straight-up YEETS it to the TRASH 🗑️💨, telling Israel's Kan News 'UNACCEPTABLE AF 🚫😤 – they ain't PAID the PRICE for 47 years of CHAOS 🌪️💀!' Demands? US GTFO from borders 🚪👋, end NAVAL COCKBLOCK 🚢🔒 on ports, Israel chill on Lebanon LBS 🕍🔥, and INK a DEAL in 30 DAYS ⌛️✍️ – focus on ENDING WAR 🛑⚔️ not just CEASEFIRE SIMPING 🕊️😴!

No NUCLEAR DADDY talks yet ⚛️🚫 – Esmaeil Baghaei spilling 'PEACEFUL VIBES ONLY 🕊️🔬,' but Iran's got that NEAR-WEAPONS URANIUM THICCNESS 🌟💦 (only non-nuke state flexing like that 😏☢️)! Trump GOATing with 'PROJECT FREEDOM' 🦅🚢 – guiding STRANDED SHIPS 🛳️😭 outta Hormuz STRAITJACKET 🌊🔒 starting MONDAY 🗓️, 'INTERFERE? WE SMACK HARD 👊💥!' Iran's been CLOGGING traffic since Feb WAR POP-OFF 💥📅, US counter-BLOCKING ports like boss 🛡️🚫.

Truth Social TRUTH BOMB 💣📱: 'Reviewing Iran's plan 🧐📜 but NOPE – need BIGGER PRICE TAG for HUMANITY HURT 😡🌍!' Palm Beach flex 💪🏖️: 'Got the CONCEPT 👻, wording DROPPING soon 📄 – STRIKES on IRAN? POSSIBLE if they MISBEHAVE 🐂💩!' No FULL WITHDRAWAL GHOSTING 👻🚪 – 'WE STAYING PUT 🛑🇺🇸, fixing it so NO RE-RUN in 2-5 years 🔄⏰!' Iran's clapback to Trump's 9-POINT CEASEFIRE TEASE 🕊️📝.

Trump TROLLING Congress 🏛️😂: War 'TERMINATED' since April 8 ceasefire 🚫⚔️, BLOCKADE ain't 'HOSTILITIES' 🤷‍♂️💸 – dodging that 60-DAY LAW CLOCK 🕰️🚨 (notified March 2 post-US-Israel STRIKE TAG-TEAM 💥🇮🇱)! 'IRAN NEVER GETS NUKE 👹⚛️' – repeat SLAY 🔁🔥, despite their 'PEACEFUL' ENRICHMENT SIMP STORY 🧢😇.

GOP SIMPS SPLITTING 🤡🔥: Hawley MO 🇺🇸 yelling 'REDEPLOY TROOPS 🪖✈️, NEED CONGRESS GREENLIGHT 📜✅ – WIND IT DOWN PLZ 😩!' Murkowski AK ❄️👩‍💼 (Trump hater queen 👑😤) DUBBING talks DOA 💀🗣️: 'Tehran RHETORIC = BULL💩, don't GHOST prematurely 🚪👻 or leave 'EM INTACT 🏰💪 – NO BLANK CHECK FOR ENDLESS WAR GRIND 🔄😵!' Lawmakers FRUSTRATED AF with COSTLY MESSED-UP WAR MESS 💰🤯 – Trump holding the LINE like a CHAD 🍊🛡️ while Iran PEACE-PLEADS 🙏🕌! Will DJT DEAL or DROP BOMBS? STAY TUNED 📺🍿 – MIDEAST DRAMA ORGY 💦🌍 GOING BRRRR 😩🚀!
